## TOP INSIGHTS

| # | Insight | Camada | Source |
|---|---------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Traffic is a water hose — amplifies what's there, doesn't fix what's broken | L1 | PTM/Module-1 |
| 2 | Only 20% of campaigns work immediately — 80% need iteration, that's normal | L1 | TMTP/Module-1 |
| 3 | Breakeven acquisition on front end = license to print money on back end | L1 | PTS/Module-3 |
| 4 | H to H (Human to Human) — every ad is a conversation with ONE person | L1 | PTM/Module-2 |
| 5 | Customer Avatar Canvas: Goals, Values, Challenges, Pain Points, Sources of Info | L4 | PTM/Module-3 |
| 6 | Traffic Temperature Model: Cold (unaware) → Warm (engaged) → Hot (ready to buy) | L4 | PTS/Module-2 |
| 7 | Before/After Grid for ad creative — map avatar's state before and after your solution | L4 | PTM/Module-4 |
| 8 | 3 Traffic Plays: Acquisition (new leads), Monetization (convert leads), Retargeting (recapture) | L4 | PTS/Module-1 |
| 9 | CBO scaling: start at $50-100/day, increase 20% every 3 days if CPA holds | L3 | TMTP/Module-8 |
| 10 | Creative is the #1 lever — same audience + different creative = completely different results | L1 | TMTP/Module-4 |
| 11 | 3-second rule: you have 3 seconds to stop the scroll — hook is everything | L3 | PTM/Module-6 |
| 12 | ICOSA content system: 1 big content piece → repurpose into 20+ micro-pieces | L4 | SSM/Module-5 |
| 13 | Minimum 1,000 impressions before making any optimization decision on a campaign | L3 | PTM/Module-9 |
| 14 | Ad spend benchmarks: $5-10/day per ad set minimum for algorithm to optimize | L3 | TMTP/Module-3 |
| 15 | True scaling = new funnels + new avatars, NOT just increasing budget on one campaign | L1 | TMTP/Module-9 |

---

## KEY NUMERICAL BENCHMARKS

| Benchmark | Value | Context | Source |
|-----------|-------|---------|--------|
| Campaign success rate out of gate | 20% | Only 2 of 10 campaigns will work immediately | TMTP/Module-1 |
| Minimum impressions before optimizing | 1,000 | Need statistical significance before judging | PTM/Module-9 |
| Minimum ad set daily budget (FB) | $5-10/day | Below this, algorithm can't optimize properly | TMTP/Module-3 |
| CBO budget increase rate | 20% every 3 days | If CPA holds, scale gradually — not 2x overnight | TMTP/Module-8 |
| Landing page conversion benchmark | 20-40% | For cold traffic lead magnets | PTM/Module-7 |
| Email opt-in cost (cold, US market) | $1-5 | Varies by niche; info products tend lower | PTS/Module-3 |
| Retargeting window (optimal) | 7-30 days | Beyond 30 days, diminishing returns significantly | PTS/Module-5 |
| Video ad retention threshold | 25% | If 25%+ watch to midpoint, creative is working | PTM/Module-6 |
| Ad frequency cap (before fatigue) | 3-5x per week | Beyond this, audience fatigues — rotate creative | TMTP/Module-5 |
| Split test minimum duration | 3-7 days | Need full weekly cycle for reliable data | PTM/Module-9 |
| Front-end breakeven CPA target | = product price | If CPA = price, you're breaking even = winning | PTS/Module-3 |
| Hook length (video ads) | 3 seconds | Must hook in first 3 sec or they scroll | PTM/Module-6 |
| Cold traffic ROAS benchmark | 1.5-3x | Don't expect 10x ROAS on cold — that's retargeting | TMTP/Module-2 |
| Warm/retargeting ROAS benchmark | 5-10x+ | Retargeting should massively outperform cold | PTS/Module-5 |
| Creative refresh cycle | Every 2-4 weeks | Especially on Facebook — creative fatigue is real | TMTP/Module-5 |

---

## PADROES DE PENSAMENTO

| Padrao | Descricao | Frequencia |
|--------|-----------|------------|
| Systems Over Hacks | Always presents traffic as a SYSTEM, never a trick or hack | Every module |
| Temperature-First Thinking | First question is always "what temperature is this traffic?" | Throughout |
| Offer Validation Before Traffic | Refuses to discuss ads until offer is confirmed viable | PTM, PTS, TMTP |
| Analogy-Heavy Teaching | Uses physical-world analogies to explain digital concepts | Constant |
| Empathetic Encouragement | Normalizes failure ("20% is normal", "it's 99% mental") | Throughout |
| Benchmark-Anchored Decisions | Always provides specific numbers before recommending action | PTM, TMTP |
| Avatar-Centric Creative | Every creative decision starts with "who is the avatar?" | PTM, PTS |
| Horizontal Scaling Bias | Consistently recommends new funnels over bigger budgets | TMTP/Module-9 |

---

## EXPRESSOES TIPICAS

- "Traffic is a water hose — you point it wherever you want to grow"
- "H to H — human to human"
- "Serve the world unselfishly and profit"
- "It's 99% mental, 1% tactical"
- "Only 20% of campaigns work right away, and that's NORMAL"
- "If you can break even acquiring a customer, you have a license to print money"
- "You don't scale campaigns. You scale systems."
- "Would YOU click on this ad? Be honest."
- "Think of it like Allen's Boots — right product, right audience, right location"
- "The ad is not about you. It's about THEM."
- "Traffic doesn't fix a broken offer"
- "Don't panic. Give the algorithm data."

---

## KEY FRAMEWORKS SUMMARY

| Framework | Steps/Components | Domain | Source |
|-----------|-----------------|--------|--------|
| Customer Avatar Canvas | Goals, Values, Challenges, Pain Points, Sources of Info, Objections, Demographics | Targeting | PTM |
| Traffic Temperature Model | Cold → Warm → Hot (3 stages with different strategies per stage) | Strategy | PTS |
| Before/After Grid | Before State (have/feel/day/status) vs After State (have/feel/day/status) | Creative | PTM |
| 3 Traffic Plays | Acquisition (new leads) → Monetization (convert) → Retargeting (recapture) | Campaign Structure | PTS |
| Ad Grid System | Hook × Body × CTA matrix — test combinations systematically | Creative Testing | TMTP |
| ICOSA Content System | 1 big piece → repurpose into 20+ micro-content across platforms | Content Marketing | SSM |
| CBO Scaling Method | Start $50-100/day → increase 20% every 3 days if CPA holds → monitor daily | Scaling | TMTP |
| Campaign Architecture | Campaign → Ad Set (targeting) → Ad (creative) — never mix objectives | Campaign Structure | PTM |
| Funnel Diagnostic | Traffic Source → Landing Page → Thank You → Email → Offer — measure each step | Optimization | PTS |
| Retargeting Waterfall | 3-day → 7-day → 14-day → 30-day → 60-day buckets with decreasing bids | Retargeting | PTS |
| Creative Testing Protocol | 1 variable at a time → 1K impressions minimum → 3-7 day duration → winner stays | Testing | PTM |
| Brand Identity Prism | Vision, Mission, Values, Voice, Visual, Story — for social media alignment | Branding | SSM |

---

## CROSS-PROGRAM PATTERNS

| Pattern | Where It Appears | Significance |
|---------|-----------------|--------------|
| Temperature-based strategy | PTM, PTS, TMTP | Core organizing principle across ALL programs |
| Breakeven acquisition | PTS, TMTP | Fundamental philosophy — repeated in every scaling discussion |
| Creative > targeting | PTM, TMTP | Consistent message: creative matters more than audience selection |
| Systems mindset | All 4 programs | Every program teaches systems, not tactics |
| Horizontal scaling | PTS, TMTP | Scaling = new funnels, not bigger budgets |
| Avatar-first approach | PTM, PTS, SSM | Customer avatar drives every creative and targeting decision |
